get.description: Retrieve a list of all bikes (Employee access required)

post.description: Create a new bike (Employee access required)

409.description: Conflict - Bike cannot be created (e.g., conflicting serial)

get.description: Retrieve a specific bike by its ID (Employee access required)

412.description: Precondition Failed - Bike cannot be deleted (e.g., bike has an invalid status)

post.description: Admit a bike to a dock (Operator access required)

412.description: Precondition Failed - Bike cannot be admitted (e.g., bike has an invalid status)

post.description: Remove a bike from a dock (Operator access required)

412.description: Precondition Failed - Bike cannot be removed (e.g., bike has an invalid status)

409.description: Conflict - Biker cannot be created (e.g., conflicting email)

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: JWT generated by the server on biker creation

412.description: Precondition Failed - Account is not pending

404.description: Not Found - Account does not exist

put.description: Update a new biker (Biker access required)

409.description: Conflict - Biker cannot be updated (e.g., conflicting email)

put.description: Change a biker's credit card (Biker access required)

204.description: Credit Card changed successfully - No content

post.description: Tries to charge late fees (Scheduler auth required)
